name: Main install full mirror (~130 mods)
description: Junctions all third-party GameData folders from the main KSP install (minus Squad/Harmony/Koobal). CKAN resolves deps for every junctioned mod.

testBriefing.success: Search ready (basic) within ~2s of VAB load; Search ready (full) within ~15s; all queries pass; parse-test-log exit 0

notes: ModTest mirror of main install. Authoritative 150-mod stress test: deploy Koobal to main GameData/KoobalSearchEngine/ and launch the main KSP instance. Enable dumpIndexStats for index timing lines.
